headline: Motorola Solutions Inc (NYSE:MSI): A Top Quality Play for Long-Term Investors
summary: Motorola Solutions (MSI) excels in quality investing with 69% ROIC, strong profit margins, and 6.79% revenue growth, meeting the Caviar Cruise screen's strict criteria for durable competitive advantages and financial discipline.

headline: 3 Big Reasons to Love Motorola Solutions (MSI)
summary: Motorola Solutions trades at $399.39 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 8.8% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 13.2%.
